description: Query the status of an async process by task_id. Returns: status (running/done/error), elapsed (seconds), and partial_output (stdout/stderr captured so far). For server processes, status stays 'running' — check partial_output for startup logs (e.g. 'VITE ready') to confirm success. Also supports querying run_tasks sub-items by ID like 'rt-uuid/item-3'. When follow=true, polls every 1 second until task completes or timeout is reached, returning new output incrementally.
name: process_task_status

task_id.description: Task ID from execute_command async or sub-item ID like 'rt-uuid/item-N'

follow.description: If true, poll every 1 second and return new output incrementally until task completes or timeout is reached

timeout.description: Maximum seconds to wait when follow=true (default: 30)
